text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and was published at SIGIR 2023 by Yunhu Ye, Binyuan Hui, et al., but its actual title is "Large Language Models are Versatile Decomposers: Decomposing Evidence and Questions for Table-based Reasoning" — not "DATER: Decomposing evidence and questions for table-based reasoning." The cited title is a fabricated shorthand that does not match the real paper's title.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3539618.3591708
